positive: A mesmerizing, high-contrast vector illustration of a bioluminescent cosmic forest. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and central, featuring stylized, geometric trees with glowing canopies that blend into ethereal nebulas. Include floating crystalline structures and exotic flora that cast vibrant cyan, magenta, and neon green light. The overall aesthetic is a seamless mix of synthwave, mystic nature, and clean linework. The color palette must be dominated by deep midnight blue and indigo, accented only by the neon bioluminescence. Minimalist, highly scalable design, suitable for apparel screen printing, crisp silhouette, graphic novel style.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, deformed, noisy, signature, cropped, out of frame, messy, realistic photo, gradients
